title: Archive
description: Automatically Back Up Your Worlds: Storage Efficient, Auto Delete Old Saves and more
body:
![Archive 1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/638b4b0c8ba4d5030ae0735a37a6724b9f4eff62.png)
[![30% off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23b03ff3e0dbbd9c24f0055121f9d24189de5362_0.webp)](https://dathost.net/r/kilim81/minecraft-server-hosting)
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7ba56bdea313f30d12390daaabdd4d5e3893385.webp)](https://discord.com/invite/5kWHYs65gM)
# About
Archive is an easy to use backup mod that automaticly backs up your world when you leave it, this way the worlds that matter most will always be save.

[![Fabric logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e5bf78b0cb5c0aa53e4787ef7deef0fe0b6d599.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/archives/versions?l=fabric)

Archive will be avalible for **NeoForge** and **Forge** in the Near Future
# BUG
**Please Note theres a bug with the Newist version of the mod that causes your world to disapear from Minecraft (The file is still there and your worlds not gone) you have to Restar Minecraft to fix it, this bug will be fixed ASAP**
## Features
✨ **Automatic Backups** - Backups are created automatically whenever you exit a world, saving you time and effort

📁 **Multiple Backup Locations** - Configure multiple backup folders on your Computer, OneDrive or external Hard Drive storage. 

🔄 **Auto-Cleanup** - Automatically deletes old backups when you reach your configured limit**(Deafult is 10)** saving disk space

⚙️ Easy Configuration - Use the intuitive ModMenu config screen to manage all settings, no config files needed! (though you can edit them manually if you prefer)
_NOTE: this is only avalible for Fabric at the moment, but it will be set up for Forge and NeoForge in the near future!_

☁️ **Cloud Storage Support** - Back up your worlds to OneDrive or any cloud storage folder connected to your computer

📝 **ZIP Compression** - Worlds are saved as compressed ZIP files with automatic numbering and DateStamping. (Please note if you edit the name of the file and remove the formating, it will no longer count towards the backup count and there for will not be deleted!)

![Archive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebed451c3e1d03f2cd7e5581d16ac3ebd7430d24.png)

1. 1.20.x (x means it should work with all version in this category)
